# Conflict notification from paintress

This is a synthetic D-Mail fixture used by the amadeus jun15 MCP
pivot contract test (refs/issues/0027 §8). It exercises the
symmetric 9-field envelope schema in the **paintress → amadeus**
direction (= amadeus as conflict consumer), complementing
paintress's and sightjack's own fixtures.

## Conflict

- Cluster: `auth`
- PR #42 (paintress) overlaps with PR #43 (paintress) on
  `internal/middleware/auth.go`.
- Suggested resolution: rebase PR #43 onto PR #42 head.

(This body is intentionally short; real conflict notifications are
larger.)
